india_trends.title: Marico eyes ₹20k cr revenue by FY30, bets on new growth levers
india_trends.summary: Marico is targeting ₹15,000 crore revenue by FY27 and ₹20,000 crore by FY30, driven by premiumisation, packaged foods, and global expansion. Strong volume growth, wellness trends, and digital-led plays in markets like Vietnam are key to its next phase of growth.

india_trends.title: Mindspace REIT raises Rs 500 cr through 10-year NCD issue
india_trends.summary: Mindspace Business Parks REIT raised Rs 500 crore through 10-year NCDs at 7.63% coupon, fully subscribed by an insurer. Funds will refinance debt, enhance cost predictability and support long-term stability, backed by strong credit ratings and diversified investor participation across instruments

india_trends.title: Curbing release of Fed meeting transcripts may improve debate, Warsh says in book

india_trends.title: Meesho Q4 Results: Co narrows loss by 88% YoY to Rs 166 crore, revenue jumps 47%
india_trends.summary: Meesho Q4 Results: The company's revenue from operations, meanwhile, rose 47% to Rs 3,531 crore versus Rs 2,400 crore posted in the corresponding quarter of the previous financial year.

Polycab India Q4 results: Profit rises 7% to Rs 786 crore; co declares Rs 47/share dividend
india_trends.summary: Electrical goods maker Polycab India reported a strong Q4 with 27% revenue growth to Rs 8,865 crore, driven by robust wires & cables and FMEG performance. Profit rose 7% to Rs 786 crore, while FY26 marked record revenues, margins, and a Rs 47/share dividend.

india_trends.title: India sees no need to curb sugar exports for now as demand weakens, sources say
india_trends.summary: India will not restrict sugar exports currently. Lower production is expected, but stable prices indicate weaker demand is balancing the shortfall.
